body.title: Attach Pursuit structure to BOREDOM→scan-for-work→do-ticket chain — prove binding
body.result: Pursuit MVP (cognition/pursuits.py) + BOREDOM chain wrap (boredom_idle.py) + 14 unit tests + observation protocol doc. Gated on IGOR_PURSUITS_ENABLED (default false). Runtime observation deferred to gate-flip session (minute-cadence protocol documented). Unblocks T-reply-forms-pursuit. Commit 69c92478.
body.description:
First concrete implementation of the Pursuit layer. Attach Pursuit structure to ONE end-to-end path:
  BOREDOM_DETECTED → 'scan-for-work' Pursuit → foreman_scan → found-work → 'do-ticket' Pursuit

Pursuit structure to add at each step:
1. Commitment event: goal-facia formation at the moment BOREDOM decides to scan (not just a tool call)
2. Anticipation dopamine trace: TWM push or goal-facia record that says 'I am pursuing scan-for-work'
3. Sub-Pursuit spawn: finding work → spawn 'do-ticket' Pursuit (not just claim the ticket)
4. Completion test: did scan-for-work succeed? Did do-ticket complete?
5. Dopamine ding: on scan finding work, on ticket completion

Affected files (check inertia before sprinting):
- wild_igor/igor/tools/worker_foreman.py — foreman_scan() wrapping
- wild_igor/igor/cognition/goal_formation.py — goal-facia creation (VERIFY HIGH-INERTIA STATUS; pre-approve with Akien if HIGH before touching)
- wild_igor/igor/cognition/push_sources.py — BoredomSource Pursuit emission

Debug protocol (per feedback memory feedback_handhold_igor_debug_minute_cadence.md):
- Fire the stimulus, check at minute 1, 2, 3, 4. Backtrack at minute 5 if no advance.
- At each checkpoint: is goal-facia present in DB? Did TWM show commitment event? Did foreman_scan run? Did ticket get claimed?

Also watch for suspected sibling bug: 'replies eat further progress by not forming a Pursuit' — if handling BOREDOM_DETECTED produces a reply-type action that consumes the attention slot rather than spawning foreman_scan as a Pursuit, that's shared mechanism with T-reply-forms-pursuit.

Scope: ONE concrete path only. No generalizing to other chains in this ticket — T-pursuit-engram-programming-docs captures the pattern, generalization is a follow-on.

Test plan:
- Check queue.json: claimed_at set on T-igor-self-audit-approach-frame at minute 1?
- Check cognition.log: goal-facia formation event logged at commitment?
- Check TWM: BOREDOM_DETECTED → 'scan-for-work' pursuit event visible?
- Dopamine ding logged at found-work + at ticket claim?
- Run minute-cadence protocol: advance observed at each minute?
